product.name: ArHard Mesh 300
descriptions: 100% polyester, 300 g/m² warp knitted military mesh fabric.
It can be used as upholstery mesh for office furniture.
technicalParameters: Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Description mentions 'military mesh fabric' and Application field lists 'Military Bag', but no explicit military garment/use is detailed beyond a bag-type application note, and product is titled/positioned as upholstery mesh for office furniture.

modelOutput.noMatchReason: Product is explicitly positioned and described as an upholstery mesh fabric for office furniture/chairs (titleDescriptor 'Upholstery Mesh Fabric', description 'used as upholstery mesh for office furniture', application image label 'Office Chair Fabric'). This is generic furniture upholstery, not vehicle/vessel transport upholstery, and though 'military mesh fabric' and 'Military Bag' are mentioned, there is no explicit tactical, uniform or service-equipment use described, so it does not meet the bar for a precise application match.
